title: CobbleCuisine x Last Resort
description: A datapack addon for CobbleCuisine that provides compatibility with the Last Resort datapack.
body:
This is a datapack addon for the [CobbleCuisine mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblecuisine), that provides compatibility with the [Last Resort datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/last-resort-cobblemon-shearems-addon) by [dogtorbloo](https://modrinth.com/user/dogtorbloo).

With this pack, ingredients and food items obtained in the Last Resort datapack can be used as ingredients to make foods from the CobbleCuisine mod. Use JEI to view the recipes. 

Credits to [tmetcalfe89](https://modrinth.com/user/tmetcalfe89) for the [Cobblemon Shearems mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-shearems), and [dogtorbloo](https://modrinth.com/user/dogtorbloo) for the [Last Resort datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/last-resort-cobblemon-shearems-addon).
